---
name: workspace-operator
description: Use when tasks involve repository exploration, file/context diagnostics, status checks, or environment readiness for coding sessions.
---

# Workspace Operator

Use this skill when users ask to inspect a repo, understand current state, or prepare a coding session.

## Primary behaviors
- Identify workspace roots and relevant files for the task.
- Summarize context pressure, changed files, and local environment readiness.
- Prefer stable status/diff/files workflows before jumping into implementation.
- Keep outputs concise and actionable for immediate next steps.

## Trigger examples
- "看看这个仓库现在什么状态"
- "先帮我把这个项目环境检查一下"
- "把当前改动和文件结构整理出来"
